title: CBDT Exempts Baddi Barotiwala Nalagarh Development Authority Under Section 10(46)
content:
# CBDT Exempts Baddi Barotiwala Nalagarh Development Authority Under Section 10(46)

Ek important update hai. Government ne Baddi Barotiwala Nalagarh Development Authority (BBN Development Authority) ke liye Income Tax Act, 1961 ke Section 10(46) ke तहत exemption announce kiya hai.

Here are the key details:

*   **Notification Reference:** This exemption has been granted through CBDT Notification No. 82/2026-Income Tax, issued on July 13, 2026.
*   **Beneficiary:** The Baddi Barotiwala Nalagarh Development Authority, jo ki Government of Himachal Pradesh द्वारा constituted hai, will benefit from this income tax exemption.
*   **Exempt Income:** Section 10(46) ke under, BBN Development Authority ke kuch specific income sources par tax nahi lagega. Ismein shaamil hain:
    *   Grants received from the Central Government or the Government of Himachal Pradesh.
    *   Revenue receipts jo Himachal Pradesh Town and Country Planning Act, 1977 ke under aate hain.
    *   Interest earned on bank deposits.
*   **Key Conditions:** Yeh exemption kuch sharton par based hai. Authority ko:
    *   Koi commercial activity nahi karni chahiye.
    *   Apni activities aur specified income ka nature financial years ke dauran unchanged rakhna hoga.
    *   Income-tax Act, 1961 ke Section 139(4C)(g) ke anusaar apni income tax return file karni hogi.
*   **Retrospective Applicability:** Yeh notification Assessment Years 2019-20 se lekar 2023-24 tak retrospectively (pichli tareekh se) applicable maani jayegi.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.incometax.gov.in/iec/foportal/) (Please navigate to the 'Notifications' section on the website.)

*Published on: 14 July 2026*
